remediations.remediation_hint: Upgrade Driver Pack to version 12.4.0 or later before migrating to Enterprise OS 2026.1 to ensure peripheral stability.

evidence.source_excerpt: Customers upgrading to Enterprise OS 2026.1 should be aware that Driver Pack versions prior to 12.4.0 were not validated against this release and may exhibit reduced peripheral stability, particularly with USB-C docking accessories and external display adapters. Fleets that have not yet standardized on the current Driver Pack baseline are encouraged to complete that upgrade ahead of any OS migration work.

metadata.notes: Candidate rule generated from corrected candidate RCAND-000360. Awaiting Phase 8 validation and Phase 9 human review.

remediations.remediation_hint: Upgrade Enterprise OS to version 2025.2 or newer to ensure consistent telemetry reporting.

evidence.source_excerpt: It has also been observed that Security Agent deployments paired with Enterprise OS builds older than 2025.2 can produce inconsistent telemetry reporting to centralized management consoles, even when all other components meet published minimums. Affected environments should treat this as a signal to revisit their OS upgrade timeline rather than assuming the Security Agent installation itself is at fault.

metadata.notes: Candidate rule generated from corrected candidate RCAND-000362. Awaiting Phase 8 validation and Phase 9 human review.

remediations.remediation_hint: Ensure System Firmware is updated to version 8.2.0 or later before installing System BIOS 6.4.2.

evidence.source_excerpt: System BIOS 6.4.2 requires System Firmware 8.2.0 or later.

metadata.notes: Candidate rule generated from corrected candidate RCAND-000363. Awaiting Phase 8 validation and Phase 9 human review.

remediations.remediation_hint: Ensure Platform Driver Pack 12.5.0 or later is installed when using System Firmware 8.2.1.

evidence.source_excerpt: System Firmware 8.2.1 supports Platform Driver Pack 12.5.0 and later.

metadata.notes: Candidate rule generated from corrected candidate RCAND-000364. Awaiting Phase 8 validation and Phase 9 human review.

remediations.remediation_hint: Ensure Endpoint Management Agent is updated to version 3.7.0 or later.

evidence.source_excerpt: Security Agent 4.8.3 requires Endpoint Management Agent 3.7.0 or later.

metadata.notes: Candidate rule generated from corrected candidate RCAND-000366. Awaiting Phase 8 validation and Phase 9 human review.

remediations.remediation_hint: Update Driver Pack to version 12.0.0 or later when using Enterprise OS 2026.1.

evidence.source_excerpt: UNSUP-002 Driver Pack versions earlier than 12.0.0 are not supported on Enterprise OS 2026.1.

metadata.notes: Candidate rule generated from corrected candidate RCAND-000371. Awaiting Phase 8 validation and Phase 9 human review.

remediations.remediation_hint: Upgrade Endpoint Management Agent to version 3.7.0 or later.

evidence.source_excerpt: UNSUP-003 Security Agent 4.8.3 is not supported with Endpoint Management Agent versions earlier than 3.7.0.

metadata.notes: Candidate rule generated from corrected candidate RCAND-000372. Awaiting Phase 8 validation and Phase 9 human review.

remediations.remediation_hint: Update Firmware to version 8.2.0 or later to avoid intermittent boot delays when running BIOS 6.4.2.

evidence.source_excerpt: Systems running BIOS 6.4.2 with Firmware earlier than 8.2.0 may experience intermittent boot delays.

metadata.notes: Candidate rule generated from corrected candidate RCAND-000373. Awaiting Phase 8 validation and Phase 9 human review.

remediations.remediation_hint: Upgrade Driver Pack to version 12.5.0 or later before migrating to Enterprise OS 2026.1.

evidence.source_excerpt: Upgrade Driver Pack versions earlier than 12.5.0 before migrating to Enterprise OS 2026.1.

metadata.notes: Candidate rule generated from corrected candidate RCAND-000381. Awaiting Phase 8 validation and Phase 9 human review.

remediations.remediation_hint: Upgrade firmware to version 8.2.0 or later before attempting to upgrade BIOS to 6.4.2.

evidence.source_excerpt: Because BIOS 6.4.2 requires Firmware 8.2.0 or later (COMP-001), firmware must be brought current before the BIOS upgrade is attempted.

metadata.notes: Candidate rule generated from corrected candidate RCAND-000397. Awaiting Phase 8 validation and Phase 9 human review.

remediations.remediation_hint: Ensure the driver pack is updated to the current version before attempting Enterprise OS migration.

evidence.source_excerpt: Per REC-003, the driver pack must be current before any Enterprise OS migration is attempted.

metadata.notes: Candidate rule generated from corrected candidate RCAND-000399. Awaiting Phase 8 validation and Phase 9 human review.
